name: Sri Lanka Fried Chiles
recipeInstructions:
1. Make a brine by dissolving the salt in water.
2. Soak the chiles for an hour in the brine.
3. Heat a sufficient amount of oil.
4. When the oil is very hot, deep fry the chiles until they are crisp.
5. Drain the fried chiles and season with salt.
6. Serve.
This is the simplest method to prepare dried chiles. It's said that this snack is popular at movie theaters in Sri Lanka, though I haven't personally verified this fact.
